creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Assign to MAINTAINER.

Note: It seems the / prefix in this issues summary caused our auto-assigner not to match net/samba43 and thus didn't automatically assign it to the current MAINTAINER. 

Please use "category/port:" as the prefix to issues to avoid this issue in future (Though we will endeavor to fix the root cause)

@Timur, This change may also need to be MFH'd, please set merge-quarterly to + when merged, or set to - if unnecessary (with comment)
